title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes Garry Tan's public playbook for using Claude Code to ship 600,000 lines of code in 60 days while running Y Combinator. The video identifies four strategies: giving Claude a role, running parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before building.
